papers.title: DetailAnywhere: Fashion Detail Generation via Cross-Modal Feature Alignment Distillation

score.rationale_zh: 强电商场景，提出 Fashion Detail Generation 与 FDBench，方法包含 CFAD 与一致性 reward；实验口径覆盖自动指标和人工评测。主要扣分来自扩散生成推理成本较高、真实代码与数据暂未公开。

zh.method_overview: 论文把服饰商品图的局部细节生成 formalize 成新任务：给定 reference garment 与 focus box，生成目标区域的高清细节图。核心是用细粒度教师模型把 reference-with-box 与 detail close-up 对齐到共享语义空间，再把这种跨模态对齐蒸馏进 MMDiT 的文本分支和图像分支。为了减少材质、颜色、纹理 hallucination，作者再训练一致性 reward model，从 aesthetic plausibility、identity consistency、target fidelity 三个维度优化生成。
zh.innovation: 相较通用图像编辑或虚拟试穿，它不是做全局编辑，而是解决电商购买决策中很具体的“看领口、袖口、织物纹理”需求。CFAD 的合理性在于先用小教师桥接 box 到 detail 的语义缺口，再让大生成模型学习对齐分布；reward model 则补上细节一致性。
zh.key_metrics: FDBench 包含 40K+ 人工校验 reference-detail pair 与 800 评测样本，覆盖 41 个品类；论文声称在所有自动指标和人工评测上超过开源 SOTA。

en.method_overview: The paper formalizes Fashion Detail Generation: given a garment reference image and a focus box, generate a high-fidelity close-up of the selected region. It uses Cross-modal Feature Alignment Distillation to align boxed references and detail close-ups in a teacher semantic space, then distills the alignment into both MMDiT branches. A consistency reward model further optimizes aesthetic plausibility, identity consistency, and target fidelity.
en.innovation: Unlike generic image editing, the method targets an e-commerce decision point: inspecting collars, cuffs, zippers, and fabric textures. CFAD first bridges the box-to-detail semantic gap in a compact teacher, then transfers it to the generative backbone; the reward model directly penalizes identity drift.
en.key_metrics: FDBench contains 40K+ human-verified reference-detail pairs and 800 evaluation pairs across 41 categories; the paper reports SOTA results across automatic metrics and human evaluation.

papers.title: UNIVID: Unified Vision-Language Model for Video Moderation

score.rationale_zh: 与达人治理和视频违规检测强相关，policy-aware caption 很适合提高审核可解释性；未进入 80 的原因是公开 snippet 中关键指标和代码链接不完整，复现一致性风险较高。

zh.method_overview: UNIVID 把视频审核从碎片化黑盒分类器改成统一 VLM：模型先生成 policy-aware caption，再供风险过滤、审核执行和趋势治理等下游任务复用。这样的中间表示让审核结论可被人工核查，也利于多任务维护。
zh.innovation: 创新点不在单个分类头，而在把 caption 作为可解释、多任务共享的语义层，减少不同违规策略之间的模型割裂。对内容生态治理而言，它能把“为什么违规”显式化。
zh.key_metrics: 论文公开摘要强调 global-scale moderation、fine-grained multimodal reasoning 与 interpretable outputs；具体完整指标需以 PDF 表格为准。

en.method_overview: UNIVID replaces fragmented video moderation classifiers with a unified VLM that generates policy-aware captions. The captions become interpretable intermediate representations reused by risk filtering, moderation actors, and trend governance. This improves human verification and system maintainability.
en.innovation: The key idea is using policy-aware captions as a shared semantic layer instead of isolated black-box heads. For content governance, it makes the reason behind a moderation decision explicit.
en.key_metrics: The abstract highlights global-scale moderation, fine-grained multimodal reasoning, and interpretable outputs; detailed metrics should be checked from the full PDF tables.

papers.title: Dynamic Content Moderation in Livestreams: Combining Supervised Classification with MLLM-Boosted Similarity Matching

score.rationale_zh: 强相关、生产部署价值高，双路分类+相似匹配能覆盖已知和新型违规；但作为系统论文，公开可复现代码与完整离线数据较难获取，因此未设为 80+。

zh.method_overview: 论文针对直播审核的实时、多模态、长时序特点，设计双路径系统：监督分类器检测明确高置信违规，MLLM 增强的相似匹配检索已知 policy case，用语义和感知 embedding 捕获新型或微妙违规。两条路径互补，能覆盖分类模型漏掉的边界样例。
zh.innovation: 比单纯分类器更适合直播场景，因为直播违规形态会快速演化，reference-based similarity 可以通过案例库扩展治理能力。方法合理、工程可行，但依赖高质量违规样例库和延迟控制。
zh.key_metrics: 搜索结果显示论文强调 production-scale deployment 和两条检测路径存在大量 exclusive detections；具体数值需以论文表格为准。

en.method_overview: The system uses two paths for livestream moderation: supervised classifiers for explicit high-confidence violations and MLLM-boosted similarity matching against curated policy cases for novel or subtle violations. Semantic and perceptual embeddings allow reference-based generalization. The two paths complement each other.
en.innovation: The design is better suited to livestreams than a single classifier because violation patterns evolve quickly. Reference-based matching lets the policy case library expand governance coverage, though it depends on high-quality cases and latency control.
en.key_metrics: Search snippets report production-scale deployment and many exclusive detections across the two paths; exact numbers should be checked from the paper tables.

papers.title: GMO-E2DIT: Grounded Multi-Operation Editing for E-Commerce Images

score.rationale_zh: 强电商视觉生产场景，agentic planner + reflective judge 的结构清晰；扣分点是 VLM+编辑器链路成本较高，公开代码未确认。

zh.method_overview: GMO-E2DIT 把电商图像编辑改写成多操作任务完成问题。VLM 同时作为 planner 和 reflective judge，把自然语言需求分解成带 source region、target region、attribute 和 optional patch 的 typed program，再编译成 operation-aware mask 交给 mask-conditioned editor 执行。
zh.innovation: 它解决 one-shot editor 把意图解析、空间定位、合成混在一步里导致的部分执行失败。对商家修图、多轮素材调整尤其有价值，因为每个操作可审计、可回滚、可复查。
zh.key_metrics: 论文摘要强调 multi-turn task completion 与局部编辑准确性；公开 snippet 未披露完整表格数值。

en.method_overview: GMO-E2DIT reframes e-commerce image editing as multi-operation task completion. A VLM acts as planner and reflective judge, decomposing instructions into typed program entries with source regions, target regions, attributes, and optional patch references. These are compiled into operation-aware masks for a mask-conditioned editor.
en.innovation: It addresses partial execution failures caused by one-shot editors that merge intent resolution, grounding, and synthesis. The auditable operation program is valuable for merchant image workflows.
en.key_metrics: The abstract emphasizes multi-turn task completion and localized editing accuracy; full numerical tables are not exposed in the snippets.

papers.title: IntentTune: Using user demand and personalization to resolve unknown query intents for e-commerce search

score.rationale_zh: 搜索 query intent 与电商强相关，用户行为和群体需求双条件设计务实；方法创新性中等，更偏产品算法优化。

zh.method_overview: IntentTune 处理电商 Query Understanding 系统输出 unknown 或模糊 intent 的问题。它利用两类信号补全 query 中未表达的意图：个人搜索/浏览/交互历史，以及 population-level demand patterns。
zh.innovation: 与只看 query text 的 intent 分类不同，IntentTune 显式把用户个性化和全站需求趋势作为 latent intent 条件，适合服饰等高歧义检索。
zh.key_metrics: 论文聚焦 fashion-related queries；公开 snippet 暂未给出完整指标数值。

en.method_overview: IntentTune resolves unknown or ambiguous intents produced by e-commerce query understanding systems using user-specific behavioral signals and population-level demand patterns. These signals infer latent intent dimensions absent from query text.
en.innovation: Unlike query-only classifiers, IntentTune conditions intent inference on personalization and aggregate demand trends, which is useful for ambiguous fashion queries.
en.key_metrics: The paper focuses on fashion-related queries; full metric values are not present in the snippets.

papers.title: OxyEcomBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Foundation Models across E-Commerce Ecosystems

score.rationale_zh: benchmark 对模型选型和治理评估很有价值，覆盖中英双语电商生态；方法创新不是模型结构，故创新性分不高。

zh.method_overview: OxyEcomBench 构建 6300 个高质量多模态实例，用统一 benchmark 评估 foundation model 在真实中英双语电商生态中的能力。它更像是模型评测与诊断工具，而不是新模型。
zh.innovation: 价值在任务体系与电商生态贴近度：商品图文理解、跨语种、多模态推理可以直接服务内容理解、商家素材质量和模型选型。
zh.key_metrics: Benchmark 规模约 6300 个实例，覆盖中文和英文电商场景。

en.method_overview: OxyEcomBench builds about 6,300 multimodal instances to evaluate foundation models across real-world Chinese-English e-commerce ecosystems. It is primarily a diagnostic benchmark rather than a new architecture.
en.innovation: Its value lies in task coverage and e-commerce fidelity: product image-text understanding, bilingual reasoning, and multimodal evaluation directly support content understanding and model selection.
en.key_metrics: The benchmark contains roughly 6,300 high-quality instances across Chinese and English e-commerce scenarios.

papers.title: Valley3: Scaling Omni Foundation Models for E-commerce

score.rationale_zh: 与商品理解、直播内容分析、治理任务高度相关，平均绝对提升超过 7%；扣分来自模型规模和复现门槛。

zh.method_overview: Valley3 是面向电商的 omni foundation model，覆盖商品理解、直播内容分析、审核治理等任务。它强调通过统一多模态底座减少任务孤岛，在多个电商业务任务上统一提升。
zh.innovation: 相比通用 VLM，Valley3 的创新点在电商领域规模化训练和任务族覆盖，而不是单个模块技巧。对内容生态巡检有价值，因为它把商品、内容、直播和治理放在同一模型框架内。
zh.key_metrics: 搜索证据显示其在 Product Understanding、Livestream Content Analysis、Moderation & Governance 上相对 baseline 平均绝对提升超过 7%。

en.method_overview: Valley3 is an omni foundation model scaled for e-commerce, covering product understanding, livestream content analysis, and moderation/governance tasks. It aims to reduce task silos through a unified multimodal backbone.
en.innovation: Compared with general VLMs, its novelty is domain-scaled e-commerce training and task-family coverage rather than a single module trick. It is valuable because product, content, livestream, and governance tasks share one framework.
en.key_metrics: Search evidence reports over 7% average absolute improvement over baselines across product understanding, livestream content analysis, and moderation/governance tasks.

papers.title: CyberJurors: A Multi-Agent Simulation Task for E-Commerce Disputes Verdict

score.rationale_zh: 电商治理相关性强，multi-agent jury simulation 有新意；但与内容生态/达人治理不是同一问题域，且工程落地依赖平台制度。

zh.method_overview: CyberJurors 提出电商纠纷裁决仿真任务 EDV，并构建 VerdictBench，用多智能体模拟众包陪审视角来预测/解释争议裁决。
zh.innovation: 把平台治理中的“申诉/裁决”问题从单模型判别转成多 agent deliberation，更接近真实多人决策；可迁移到达人违规申诉、商家处罚复核等治理流程。
zh.key_metrics: VerdictBench 包含 6000 个真实案例。

en.method_overview: CyberJurors introduces E-commerce Dispute Verdicts and VerdictBench, using multi-agent simulation to model crowdsourced jury decisions for dispute outcomes.
en.innovation: It reframes platform adjudication from single-model classification to multi-agent deliberation, closer to real review processes and potentially transferable to creator appeals.

papers.title: GAIA: Global Adaptive Instruction Tuning via Gaussian Processes

score.rationale_zh: 与数据质量和大规模训练样本选择弱相关，适合治理标注数据清洗；但不是电商专用论文。

zh.method_overview: GAIA 把 instruction tuning 的数据选择建模成全局 utility manifold 估计问题，用 Gaussian Process 在语义空间中估计样本价值，帮助选择更高效的数据子集。
zh.innovation: 相比启发式过滤或局部打分，它强调全局自适应估值，可用于减少低质/重复标注对模型微调的影响。
zh.key_metrics: 公开摘要强调 data valuation as a global estimation process；具体指标需看论文全文。

en.method_overview: GAIA models instruction-tuning data selection as global utility manifold estimation with Gaussian Processes over semantic space. It selects higher-utility samples for efficient tuning.
en.innovation: Unlike heuristic filtering or local scoring, it performs global adaptive valuation, which can help reduce low-quality or redundant labeled data.
en.key_metrics: The abstract highlights global data valuation; detailed metrics require the full paper.

papers.title: AutoGaze: Automatic Redundant Patch Removal for Efficient Video Understanding

score.rationale_zh: 与电商治理弱相关但对长视频/直播巡检很有价值；公开 GitHub 仓库存在，因此不重复复现。

zh.method_overview: AutoGaze 自动移除视频中的冗余 patch，把 ViT/MLLM token 数减少 4x-100x，使长视频和高分辨率视频理解成本下降。它对直播巡检、达人视频抽帧审核有直接效率价值。
zh.innovation: 核心创新是把视觉注意力/冗余 patch 删除做成轻量模块，尽量不改变下游 MLLM 主体。对于治理场景，效率提升比单点精度提升更可能决定可用性。
zh.key_metrics: 官方仓库说明 token compression 达到 4x-100x，ViT speedup 最高 19x。

en.method_overview: AutoGaze automatically removes redundant video patches, reducing ViT/MLLM token counts by 4x-100x and making long high-resolution video understanding cheaper.
en.innovation: Its contribution is a lightweight patch-pruning module that preserves the downstream MLLM pipeline. For governance, efficiency can be the deciding factor for real-time usability.
en.key_metrics: The official repository reports 4x-100x token compression and up to 19x ViT speedup.
